info.name: DummyJSON
info.description:
**DummyJSON** is a free online **fake REST API service** designed for learning, prototyping, frontend development, and API testing.

It provides ready-to-use mock endpoints that return realistic JSON data — without needing a real backend.

Website: [https://dummyjson.com](https://dummyjson.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

{
    "title" : "Test Product",
    "description" : "This is a test product.",
    "category" : "test",
    "price" : 10.99,
    "discountPercentage" : 5.00,
    "rating" : 4.5,
   "stock" : 100,
   "tags" : ["beauty", "test"],
    "brand" : "Test Brand",
    "sku" : "TEST-BRAND-TEST-001",
    "weight" : 5,
    "dimensions" : {
            "width" : 10,
            "height" : 15,
            "depth" : 20
    }
}
